name: portfolio-forge
description: Une plateforme web complète qui permet à chaque professionnel de créer, gérer et partager son portfolio digital moderne.

scripts.test: npm run test:client && npm run test:server
scripts.lint: npm run lint:client && npm run lint:server
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.deploy:vercel: cd client && npm run build && vercel --prod
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:vercel && npm run deploy:railway
scripts.postinstall: echo '🚀 PortfolioForge - Installation completed! Run npm run dev to start development servers.'

author: Emmanuel Nduwayo Bagi <emmanuel.bagi.n@gmail.com>
